constraint.description: ContributionModels stay independent from shell APIs, concrete views, and write-side domain carriers.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerType {viewBucket: 'MODEL'})-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(target:Java:Type) WITH source, target, split(source.fqn, '.') AS sourceSegments, split(target.fqn, '.') AS targetSegments WHERE size(sourceSegments) >= 4 AND sourceSegments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND ( target.fqn =~ 'bootstrap\\..*' OR target.fqn =~ 'src\\.data\\..*' OR target.fqn =~ 'shell\\..*' OR ( target.fqn =~ 'src\\.domain\\..*' AND ( target.fqn =~ 'src\\.domain\\.[^.]+\\.published\\..*(Command|Query|Operation|Edit)(\\$.*)?' OR NOT target.fqn =~ 'src\\.domain\\.[^.]+\\.published\\..+' ) ) OR ( target.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\..*' AND ( NOT (target.viewBucket = 'MODEL') OR NOT ( ( size(targetSegments) >= 4 AND targetSegments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND sourceSegments[2] = targetSegments[2] AND sourceSegments[3] = targetSegments[3] ) OR ( size(targetSegments) >= 6 AND targetSegments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND target.viewBucket = 'MODEL' ) ) ) ) ) RETURN DISTINCT source.relativePath AS Source, coalesce(target.relativePath, target.fqn) AS Target, 'JavaFX bindable state, same-root models, reusable child ContentModels, and read-side domain published carriers only' AS ExpectedDirection, source.fqn + ' -> ' + target.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'ContributionModels must not depend on shell APIs, concrete views, data, bootstrap, or domain internals.' AS Details ORDER BY Source, Target
